item.title: ElecMoga WiFi antenne AC 1300 Mbps USB 3.0 Dual Band 5GHz/2 4 GHz WiFi USB-adapter voor pc/desktop/laptop/tablet USB WiFi met 2 antennes van 5dBi ondersteunt Windows 11/10/8/7/Vista/XP Mac OS X
item.description: You’ve got ElecMoga WiFi antenne AC 1300 Mbps USB 3.0 Dual Band 5GHz/2 4 GHz WiFi USB-adapter voor pc/desktop/laptop/tablet USB WiFi met 2 antennes van 5dBi ondersteunt Windows 11/10/8/7/Vista/XP Mac OS X at the following link: ℹ️: 🌟【Plug and Play】USB wifi is driver-free for Windows 11/10(Just plug and play ). Compatible with Windows 11/ 10/ 8/ 7/ XP/ Mac OS X. You can download the driver from the mini CD (included) or from the link: (https://1drv.
